description_long: This is a two-story warehouse building with a flat concrete roof and a predominantly red brick exterior. The front facade features large, rectangular window openings on the upper floor and a row of windows on the lower floor, some of which are partially covered or broken. A metal double door and a smaller red door provide entry, while an external air conditioning unit is mounted on the front wall. Electrical conduit and cables run along the facade, adding to the utilitarian appearance. The side and rear walls are plain brick with minimal detailing, and the structure shows signs of weathering and urban use.
description: A two-story red brick warehouse with a flat concrete roof, large window openings, metal doors, and visible utility fixtures.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with large window openings, a metal double door, a red side door, an air conditioning unit, and visible electrical cables.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the continuation of the brickwork, a large upper window opening, and the air conditioning unit extending from the front.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the utilitarian design.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a featureless brick wall with subtle horizontal lines, lacking windows or doors.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of red brick with concrete framing, featuring large rectangular window openings on the upper floor and a row of windows on the lower floor. Entry is provided by a metal double door and a smaller red door, with an air conditioning unit and exposed electrical conduit adding functional detail.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and made of concrete, with a slightly raised edge and visible weathering but no skylights or rooftop equipment.
